payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory stating Sam is from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is explicitly superseded by mem_new, and superseded memories are not surfaced as current facts.
payload.decision: return mem_new as current and exclude mem_old because mem_old is marked superseded by the newer Sam-from-Goldman memory

entity_resolution.reason: No entity merge or disambiguation was required beyond identifying Sam as the subject in both memories.

memory_cards.statement: An older memory about Sam was filtered because it is superseded and should not be presented as current.

details: Identified mem_new as the current memory for Sam.
Applied strict recall policy to exclude superseded facts from current results.

repair_options: Verify that mem_old has a superseded status and points to mem_new as its replacement.
Confirm both memories refer to the same Sam entity.
If recall should show history, add an option to include superseded memories as non-current context.
If the supersession link is incorrect, remove or repair the edge so both memories can be reconsidered.
